log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Goblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goblin — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Goblin — Armored Escapist HP: 41/59
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Goblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Goblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Goblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goblin — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 21 damage. Goblin — Armored Escapist HP: 20/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Goblin — Armored Escapist HP: 3/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Goblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 3/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Goblin — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goblin — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Goblin — Armored Escapist HP: -13/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:7+3=10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
